greengrassv2.componentversion.InlineReci.Docs: The recipe to use to create the component. The recipe defines the component's metadata, parameters, dependencies, lifecycle, artifacts, and platform compatibility.  You must specify either `InlineRecipe` or `LambdaFunction`.

greengrassv2.componentversion.LambdaFunc.Docs: The parameters to create a component from a Lambda function.  You must specify either `InlineRecipe` or `LambdaFunction`.

greengrassv2.componentversion.Tags.Docs: Application-specific metadata to attach to the component version. You can use tags in IAM policies to control access to AWS IoT Greengrass resources. You can also use tags to categorize your resources. For more information, see [Tag your AWS IoT Greengrass Version 2 resources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/greengrass/v2/developerguide/tag-resources.html) in the *AWS IoT Greengrass V2 Developer Guide*.  This `Json` property type is processed as a map of key-value pairs. It uses the following format, which is different from most `Tags` implementations in AWS CloudFormation templates.
